name: Tantalus
short_description: You are a patrol staff aboard the spaceship 'Tantalus'. Explore a spaceship filled with mystery, uncover anomalies, and report them to the control AI.
detailed_description:
Tantalus is a sci-fi anomaly game set on a mysterious spaceship. Take on the role of a patrol staff member, investigate anomalies throughout the ship, and report them to the control AI.

Patrol Staff Guide

1. Do not overlook any anomalies.

2. If an anomaly is detected, use the employee tablet to take a photo of the point and then move on to the next area.

3. The photo will be automatically submitted to the control AI, which will handle the issue.

4. Complete patrol of Sector 1 through 8 before returning.

Play Time

20 to 90 minutes

Controls

WASD : Move

C: Toggle Camera ON/OFF

F: Open Door

Shift: Sprint

ESC: Open Menu

Adult Content Description

This game contains some scary monsters and aliens, blood, and supernatural horror elements.
